text:
TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: For services involving multiple encounters on different days, or periods of care extending over two or 
more days, this would be the date on which the service covered by this claim began. ^ Back to TOC ^
